problem: How are trauma and stress responses inherited epigenetically across generations?
hypothesis: If Epigenetic methylation/demethylation of regulatory region is applied to epigenetically, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Randomized controlled trial Phase I with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
